title: Lead-config per-session stats
description: graphify-out/.lead_config_stats.json — append-only ring (~50 records) of extensions/lead-config.ts's per-session model-detection stats. Derived/machine-local (under gitignored graphify-out/), optional. Malleable: extra fields allowed so the extension can grow the record. audit-pipelines.py:check_lead_profile_coverage() WARNs when a model id repeatedly resolves to the fallback profile across recorded sessions (roster drift — add a profile or extend a match pattern).

models.description: Distinct model ids seen this session.

profiles.description: Distinct profile names applied this session.

fallbacks.description: Count of prompts that resolved to the fallback profile.

fallbackModels.description: Distinct model ids that resolved to the fallback profile.
